reviews.text:
We couldn’t be happier with our experience working with Lisa as our wedding photographer! From the very beginning, she was incredible to work with — professional, kind, and so easy to communicate with. Lisa responded quickly to messages, kept us informed throughout the process, and was always accommodating, even with our last-minute additions and changes to the schedule for different photo shoots.

Lisa has an amazing eye for detail and gave us excellent direction on posing — everything from hand placement to head angles — which made us feel confident and look our best in every shot. She was so sweet and caring throughout the day, helping to ease any stress and making sure we were comfortable and happy.

On top of all that, Lisa delivered our photos incredibly fast, and they turned out beautifully. We’ll treasure them forever.

If you’re looking for a photographer who’s talented, thoughtful, and genuinely a joy to work with, we highly recommend Lisa!

The Best Decision We Made for Our Wedding

If you are looking for a wedding photographer, stop your search and hire Lisa. She is without a doubt one of the BEST decisions we made for our wedding.

My husband and I are from Atlanta, GA and planned a destination wedding in Telluride, which was both exciting and overwhelming. I knew I wanted someone who not only took beautiful photos but also made the experience enjoyable. Lisa exceeded every expectation we had.

From our very first phone call, it was clear that she is passionate, kind, and incredibly knowledgeable. Her website was stunning, she was super responsive, and she offered genuine advice on everything from our engagement shoot to rehearsal dinner venues. She quickly became more than just our photographer, she was a huge help throughout the entire planning process.

Our engagement shoot in Telluride was amazing. Lisa made us feel completely comfortable in front of the camera and delivered our fully edited gallery by lunchtime that same day. We could hardly believe it! The photos were breathtaking! Timeless, romantic, and exactly what we were hoping for. After that, we booked our wedding date around her availability. Yes, she’s THAT good.

On the wedding day, Lisa arrived early and immediately got to work. She did not miss a single detail. When it started raining right after our first look, I was heartbroken and overwhelmed with emotion. Lisa comforted me with calm and positive energy. She went above and beyond by calling my makeup artist for a touch-up and even paid for it herself. We tried to pay her back, but she insisted it was no problem. She also offered to meet us the next morning to ensure we got the beautiful portraits we had envisioned. I was blown away by her kindness and dedication. She is not only incredibly talented but also a genuinely great and kind person.

The photos are stunning. Every emotion, every meaningful glance, every dreamy detail was captured perfectly. One moment that stood out was during the ceremony when we had a tribute to my late grandfather. A rainbow appeared behind me, and Lisa immediately pointed it out to me and made sure it was documented. Those pictures will always be some of my most cherished memories. Lisa sees all the right moments and pays attention to every detail. She is everything a bride could want in a wedding photographer.

If you are worried about budget like we were, please know that Lisa is worth every penny and more. I would pay for her services again and again for the experience, the photos, and the peace of mind she brought to our day.

We are beyond grateful and will treasure these memories forever. Thank you, Lisa, for turning our vision into reality and giving us the fairytale wedding photos we dreamed of. You are truly one of a kind.

My wife and I can’t say enough wonderful things about Lisa Marie Wright!!   She is not only an amazing photographer, but she is an incredibly nice and helpful person!   All throughout the process if we asked her for input on things we were trying to decide between, she would provide helpful feedback, and even made additional suggestions that saved us time and money in the end.    She was also very calm and supportive during all phases of the process, which helps when the bride and groom are running around trying to get a bunch of things done the weekend of the wedding.

Not only is she a wonderful person and does phenomenal work, but she is also super punctual, efficient, and responsive.   During the planning process many other vendors would take days or weeks to get back to us, but Lisa would respond within minutes with positive energy and helpful feedback!

We had a few other great vendors, but Lisa was the best decision we made and she is 100% who you should pick!    She is worth every penny!  My wife and I are extremely thankful that we have our amazing photos to cherish moving forward and owe all the credit to Lisa!!  😊

Lisa was truly nothing short of incredible! Lisa was exceptional through the entire process, assisting with engagement day logistics, contingency planning and vision casting.  She had a quick and high quality turnover of photo edits and most importantly captured all of our special moment with great attention to detail to allow us to relive the moment again and again!

I don’t even know where to begin with how amazing Lisa was! She brought such a calming presence to our wedding day. She made me feel so comfortable in front of the camera. I am beyond grateful for all her hard work to capture every shot! Kyle and I had the most special day and Lisa made it even better. Her attention to detail was unreal and I can’t recommend her enough!
